## Source: amazon-inspector (871d12cd83665d57f07a3b718ffef817f52b1baa68cc2ddc00d4ea1e010fc1f7)
The package nflx-cmisc was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (240f9cd9260bb6bb3fa3c72586081a1c0e0a1a037ec705cbddef5835729c1ed5)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'nflx-cmisc' @ 3.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
